task_completion.description: Verify the location is set to the Great Pyramid of Giza.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium location window or bottom status bar shows 'Earth, Giza' or coordinates approximately 29°58'N 31°08'E (29.9792° N, 31.1342° E) and an elevation of 60m.

task_completion.description: Verify the date and time are set to June 21, 2560 BCE at 22:00 UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium Date/Time window or bottom status bar displays the year as -2559 (the astronomical year for 2560 BCE), month 6, day 21, and time 22:00.

task_completion.description: Verify atmosphere/ground are disabled and equatorial grid/constellation lines are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sky background is completely black (atmosphere off), no landscape/horizon is visible (ground off), a circular grid is overlaid on the sky (equatorial grid on), and lines connecting stars into shapes are visible (constellation lines on).

task_completion.description: Verify Thuban (Alpha Draconis) is selected and centered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Thuban is in the exact center of the screen, typically indicated by a selection reticle around the star and information text about 'Thuban' or 'Alpha Draconis' in the upper left corner.

task_completion.description: Verify a screenshot was saved to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window, terminal, or Stellarium confirmation message showing that an image file was saved in the '/home/ga/Pictures/stellarium' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the lecture notes were created with the required terms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the file '/home/ga/Desktop/precession_notes.txt' containing the specific terms 'Thuban', 'precession', and '2560 BCE'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Stellarium application GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Stellarium application interface (toolbars, rendering window, dialog boxes) is visible in the screenshots, not just a web browser or static image viewer.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the expected coordinates or dates into a text file instead of applying them in Stellarium.
integrity.visual_evidence: The coordinates and date/time are visible within the Stellarium application's own UI elements (status bar or settings windows).

integrity.description: Verify the notes file and screenshot directory were genuinely interacted with.
integrity.visual_evidence: System UI elements like a file manager, terminal, or text editor show the actual paths (/home/ga/Desktop/precession_notes.txt and /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium) rather than mocked outputs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: Great Pyramid of Giza (29.9792° N, 31.1342° E). Target Date: 2560 BCE corresponds to astronomical year -2559. Notes path: /home/ga/Desktop/precession_notes.txt. Screenshots directory: /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium.
